dbExport.title: Send away thy lore
dbExport.desc: Save thy current lore to a scroll for safekeeping elsewhere

dbImportDesc: Hark! This shall strike out all existing lore

dbImportOld.title: Bring forth lore from an ancient version of Ampersand
dbImportOld.note: Ancient versions used a format (ampdb) now withered. If thou keepest old scrolls, bring them forth now and send them away anew, for this path shall soon be closed.

pkImport: Bring forth lore from a PluralKit scroll
ocImport: Bring forth lore from an Octocon scroll
tuImport: Bring forth lore from a Tupperbox scroll
spImport: Bring forth lore from a Simply Plural scroll

status.imported: The lore hath been brought forth. Pray, restart the work.
status.importedSp: The Simply Plural lore hath been brought forth. Pray, restart the work.
status.importedOc: The Octocon lore hath been brought forth. Pray, restart the work.
status.importedPk: The PluralKit lore hath been brought forth. Pray, restart the work.
status.importedTu: The Tupperbox lore hath been brought forth. Pray, restart the work.
status.exportedApp: The lore hath been sent away to thy chosen station.
status.exportedAppIos: The lore hath been sent away to the Ampersand fold in the Files work.
status.errorExport: Foul play during the sending away of lore.
status.error: Foul play during the bringing forth of lore.
status.errorOc: Foul play during the Octocon bringing forth.
status.errorSp: Foul play during the Simply Plural bringing forth.
status.errorPk: Foul play during the PluralKit bringing forth.
status.errorTu: Foul play during the Tupperbox bringing forth.
